hypothesis: For order-profitability estimation, a gradient boosting regressor will outperform linear or ridge regression on held-out data, particularly in RMSE and MAE.
main_limitations: Validation evidence only; final test remains untouched; improvement is modest; residual errors remain large; predictions are compressed toward the mean; SHAP and feature importance are not causal; approved commercial predictors and granular one-hot drivers require target-policy caution.
